name: Alcohol
definition: Ethanol consumption from alcoholic beverages. Includes beer, wine, spirits. Dose-dependent effects on liver, cardiovascular system, cancer risk, and neuropsychiatric outcomes. Moderate vs heavy use has different risk profiles.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: J-shaped curve; moderate may have different effects than heavy

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Alcohol initiation; brain development; addiction risk
